title: Anthropic rents SpaceX?
summary: Anthropic partnered with SpaceX to access the Colossus GPU cluster, addressing a core weakness: lack of vertical integration in chips and infrastructure. The video argues that the AI race is shifting from benchmarks to hardware control and datacenter dominance, with implications for Claude's reliability and rate limits.
